title: DetectForge — Attack Path Visualizer
description: Threat actor kill chains and blind spots through your environment

options.query: | inputlookup detectforge_actor_chains.csv | stats first(coverage_pct) as coverage_pct, first(longest_blind_window) as blind_steps, first(total_steps) as total_steps by actor | sort coverage_pct

| inputlookup detectforge_actor_chains.csv | eval status=case(status=="COVERED","🟢 DETECTED",status=="GAP","🔴 BLIND SPOT",status=="BROKEN","🟠 BROKEN",true(),status) | table actor,step,technique_id,technique_name,tactic,status | sort actor,step
| inputlookup detectforge_actor_chains.csv | where status="GAP" | stats count as gap_steps, values(technique_id) as techniques by actor | sort -gap_steps
| inputlookup detectforge_actor_chains.csv | stats first(coverage_pct) as coverage_pct by actor | sort coverage_pct
| inputlookup detectforge_actor_chains.csv | stats first(longest_blind_window) as blind_steps by actor | sort -blind_steps

viz_actor_coverage.title: Kill Chain Coverage % by Threat Actor (higher = safer)

viz_blind_window.title: Consecutive Blind Spot Steps per Actor

status.data: > table | seriesByName("status") | formatByValue(matchMode="regex") | case("COVERED", {"background":"#2ecc71","color":"#000"}), case("GAP", {"background":"#e74c3c","color":"#fff"}), case("BROKEN", {"background":"#f39c12","color":"#000"})

viz_chain_table.title: Kill Chain Steps — GREEN=Detected / RED=Blind Spot / ORANGE=Broken

viz_critical_path.title: Critical Paths — Actors with Most Undetected Steps
